title: pharbitis triloba
intro: Pharbitis triloba, also known as the sweet four o'clock, is a flowering plant in the morning glory family that is native to Mexico and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, colds, and digestive issues. Pharbitis triloba is also valued for its health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, relieving stress and anxiety, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
